content:
Subject: Request for Consistent Pricing — Unexplained 17% Rate Fluctuation on Identical Rides

Dear Uber Customer Support,

I am writing to address a recurring pricing inconsistency on my account that requires immediate clarification and resolution.

Over recent weeks, I have been taking the same ride — same pickup location, same destination, same ride type — yet my charges have fluctuated between **$5.40 and $6.33** with no discernible reason. That represents a **17% pricing swing** for an identical service. There has been no change in route, time of day, or ride category that would justify this variance, and no surge pricing notification has been displayed at the time of booking.

As a loyal Uber customer, I find this level of unpredictability unacceptable. Transparent and consistent pricing is a baseline expectation, not a premium feature. I should not have to wonder each time I open the app whether I will be charged fairly.

**I am requesting one of the following:**

1. **A consistent rate locked at $5.40** for this specific route and ride type, reflecting the lowest fare I have already been charged for the identical trip, or
2. **A detailed written explanation** of exactly what variables caused each fare to differ, with documentation showing how each charge was calculated.

I want to be transparent: I am actively evaluating alternatives. Competitors such as Lyft and regional ride services are offering predictable, upfront pricing that does not shift arbitrarily for the same trip. Pricing reliability will be a deciding factor in where I take my business going forward.

I respectfully request a substantive response within **seven (7) business days** of this email. A generic or automated reply directing me to the help center FAQ will not suffice — I am seeking a direct, account-specific resolution.

I value the convenience Uber provides and would prefer to remain a customer. However, I will not continue to accept inconsistent charges without explanation or correction.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Email Address]
[Your Phone Number]
[Uber Account Email, if different]
